subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue headlight pools smeared into a vast diffused halo by dense fog, with soft lens-flare artifacts, halation, and bloom; faint amber side marker glow barely piercing the mist
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared foggy forest road
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows from a faint fog halo to a blinding bloom as it nears the crest, peaks at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and dissolves back into the mist

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the foggy forest road, cresting a misty rise, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A rural forested two-lane road in the dim pre-dawn, wrapped in cold fog and mist, no central divider, hemmed by dense dark evergreens whose trunks fade into grey murk. Damp asphalt with worn lane markings glistens faintly; drifting autumn leaves lie plastered on the shoulder. The road rises through the trees and crests ahead, the fog-shrouded crest briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane. Beyond a few metres the world dissolves into featureless foggy grey-black, no sky visible.

lighting.conditions: Dim foggy pre-dawn with no artificial lighting; damp roadway, headlights only
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit into fog; intense oncoming high-beam glare ahead and slightly left diffusing through mist
lighting.shadows: Almost no cast shadows in the flat fog; only the ego light cone glowing on damp asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Ego headlights bounce back off dense fog as a glowing wall; oncoming high beams produce a huge diffused halo, overwhelming fog-scattered bloom, soft starburst flares, and near-total washout

aesthetics.composition: Centered road swallowed by fog with the dim crest near mid-frame, oncoming glare blooming as a halo upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cold grey fog and damp black asphalt with faint green-black trees, cut by diffused white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, eerie, disorienting, near-blinding, extremely cautious
aesthetics.patterns: Fog-softened tree trunks and faint dashed markings emerging and vanishing

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking into fog, subtle vertical bob over the crest, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow effective depth as fog erases the background
cinematography.focus: Immediate road ahead only, everything beyond lost to fog; glare fully overwhelms focus at peak

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a foggy forested road

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the foggy forest road at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear as a faint diffused glow past a misty crest
Vehicle reaches the crest; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify into a fog-scattered halo, flooding the view with glare
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage severely impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, the immediate road becomes visible again through fog, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the foggy forest road at steady speed with a faint diffused oncoming glow past a misty crest
segments.key_changes: A distant halo of headlights begins to bloom in the fog
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Cresting the rise as oncoming high beams flare into a severe fog-scattered halo
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, huge diffused bloom and soft starburst wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes through fog
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, halo fades, immediate road regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a foggy forested road in dim pre-dawn, ego headlights glowing back off the mist over damp markings while a faint diffused glow grows past a fog-shrouded crest. By 0:01 the vehicle reaches the crest and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens into a halo. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by fog-scattered white-blue glare, soft lens flares, and near-total washout. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with the severely impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the immediate road reappears through fog, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Muffled low hum of the engine and damp tire hiss softened by fog, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. A muted whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing close, dripping condensation and utter foggy-forest stillness; no music or speech.
